title: Bitter Crunchy Midnight Sweet Potato Stir-fry
description: A midnight-craving korean-inspired dish featuring a unique blend of bitter flavors with crunchy elements, served with a sweet touch from brown sugar and sous-vide cooking for added tenderness.

ingredients.name: Bitter melon (bitter gourd)
ingredients.notes: use fresh, crisp ones for crunchiness

ingredients.name: Oil
ingredients.notes: high smoke point oil like avocado or grapeseed

ingredients.name: Sugarcane syrup (brown sugar)
ingredients.notes: or a small amount of brown sugar, depending on preference for sweetness

ingredients.name: Soy sauce
ingredients.notes: light soy sauce or tamari for umami flavor

instructions: Preheat your sous-vide water bath to 150°F (65°C) and cook sweet potatoes for 3 hours, and bitter melon for 4 hours.
